description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe, predominantly dark gray with lighter gray and blue accents. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material, featuring a subtle pattern and synthetic overlays for structural support. The midsole is thick and cushioned, colored off-white with a gray lower section, designed for shock absorption and comfort during running or walking. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with round laces and reinforced eyelets. The heel counter is visibly padded for ankle support, and the outsole appears to have a textured tread for traction. The overall design suggests a focus on performance, comfort, and durability, suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark gray athletic running shoe with mesh upper, cushioned off-white midsole, and standard criss-cross laces, designed for comfort and support.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and the full profile of the cushioned midsole and outsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel counter, heel support structure, and the layered midsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh pattern, overlays, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe box, lacing system, and the mesh texture on the upper.
attribute_logo: Stylized 'A' stripe logo on the side in light gray
